_comment: PREDEFINED VPS capacity limits for the SHIPPED `small` speech model. Fixed BEFORE the authoritative VPS benchmark — no post-hoc tuning. `bench_speech.py --gate` evaluates the measured report against these and exits non-zero on ANY fail. Rationale sized for a modest production VPS (~2-4 vCPU, ~4-8 GiB, the Hetzner-class box in DEPLOY.md).

_rationale.maxProcessingRatioMedian: small int8 on CPU runs ~1.5-4x realtime; 5.0 keeps a 60s recording under ~5 min and fails a pathologically slow/oversubscribed box.
_rationale.maxPeakRssMib: small int8 resident ~0.6-1.0 GiB; 2 GiB ceiling is safe headroom on a 4 GiB box.
_rationale.maxCancelExitSec: cooperative cancel + process-group kill should exit well under 12s.
_rationale.maxConcurrentAggregateRatio: 2 parallel jobs on a shared box should not exceed ~2x a single job's wall time envelope.
_rationale.requireConcurrentAllOk: both concurrent bridges must complete rc=0 (no OOM/starvation).
